label: Fantasy
description: Magic, myth, and imagined worlds.

label: Science Fiction
description: Speculative science and technology.

label: Horror
description: Fear, dread, and the uncanny.

label: Mystery
description: Questions, clues, and discovery.

label: Romance
description: Love and intimate relationships.

label: Thriller
description: High tension, danger, and pursuit.

label: Historical Fiction
description: Historical fiction stories are stories set in a specific time period in the past. The accuracy of the setting and the details of the era are important to the story.

label: Erotica
description: Explicit sexual content.

label: Comedy
description: Humorous stories.

label: Adventure
description: Journeys, quests, and exploration.

label: Drama
description: Stories focused on character development and emotional conflict.

label: Slice of Life
description: Stories focused on everyday life.

label: Crime
description: Stories focused on crime and the criminal justice system.

label: Dystopian
description: Oppressive societies and struggles against them.

label: Urban Fantasy
description: Fantasy stories set in a modern urban environment.

label: Supernatural
description: Stories that feature supernatural elements.

label: Paranormal
description: Stories that feature paranormal elements.

label: Superhero
description: Stories that feature superheroes.

label: Dark Fantasy
description: Fantasy stories with dark and/or mature themes.

label: Sword and Sorcery
description: Sword-and-sorcery stories are fast-paced adventure fantasies that center on powerful, larger-than-life heroes engaging in thrilling sword fights against terrifying monsters, corrupt sorcerers, and ruthless villains, often in dark, gritty, or morally ambiguous settings.

label: Epic Fantasy
description: Epic fantasy stories are grand-scale fantasies that center on powerful heroes engaging in thrilling sword fights against terrifying monsters, corrupt sorcerers, and ruthless villains, often in dark, gritty, or morally ambiguous settings.

label: Political
description: Political stories are stories that center on power, governance, and the struggle for control.

label: Space Opera
description: Space opera stories are grand-scale science fiction stories that center on interstellar empires, galactic conflicts, and heroic spacefarers, often blending elements of adventure, romance, and political intrigue across vast cosmic backdrops.

label: Literary Fiction
description: Literary fiction is fiction that is intended to be artistically significant. It is often characterized by its focus on character development, emotional conflict, and social commentary. Literary fiction is often contrasted with genre fiction, which is written to appeal to a specific audience and is often characterized by its focus on plot and action.

label: Action
description: Stories driven by physical conflict, daring feats, and kinetic set pieces.

label: Fairy Tale
description: Wonder-filled stories built from folklore, enchantment, transformation, and archetypal conflict.

label: Fable
description: Brief, symbolic stories that use imagined characters or situations to explore a moral idea.

label: Noir
description: Atmospheric crime stories shaped by moral ambiguity, corruption, and fatalistic pressure.

label: Psychological
description: Stories centered on perception, inner conflict, memory, and the unstable workings of the mind.

label: Satire
description: Stories that use wit, irony, or exaggeration to expose folly and criticize institutions or behavior.

label: Speculative Fiction
description: Imaginative stories that ask how life, society, or identity might change under different conditions.

label: Western
description: Stories of law, survival, and changing societies on a frontier or in a frontier-inspired setting.

label: Wuxia
description: Martial-arts adventure stories about wandering heroes, honor, mastery, and justice.

label: Xianxia
description: Chinese-inspired fantasy about cultivation, immortality, spiritual power, and transcendent adventure.

label: Children's Fiction
description: Stories written for children, with age-appropriate stakes, language, and imaginative scope.
